_comment: Bad case 13 — LANDING_CLEARED must auto-correct to IDLE 90 sec after touchdown. The engine holds LANDING_CLEARED while the pilot is still rolling; once stopped/slow on the ground the session has ended. Without this test a silent regression on the 90s timer would never show up in make test. Part B confirms the session is cleanly back at IDLE by starting a fresh Ground flow.
name: Bad case 13 — LANDING_CLEARED -> IDLE after 90 sec on ground (KPAO US)

context.callsign: November One Two Three Alpha Bravo

say.text: Palo Alto Tower November One Two Three Alpha Bravo inbound for landing
November One Two Three Alpha Bravo on final full stop

say.note: 95 sec on ground — LANDING_CLEARED.on_ground (delay 90s) must fire
Part B — fresh Ground flow confirms IDLE is usable

say.text: Palo Alto Ground November One Two Three Alpha Bravo request taxi to the ramp
